question: Quel est le chiffre d'affaires total ?
sql:
SELECT SUM(F.SalesAmount) AS CA_total 
FROM FactInternetSales F

question: Combien de commandes ont été passées au total ?
sql:
SELECT COUNT(SalesOrderNumber) AS TotalCommandes
FROM FactInternetSales
commentaire: COUNT sans DISTINCT - ligne pas commande

question: Quel est le prix moyen des produits ?
sql:
SELECT AVG(DP.ListPrice) AS PrixMoyen
FROM DimProduct DP

question: Quel est le revenu total par pays ?
sql:
SELECT T.SalesTerritoryCountry AS Pays, SUM(F.SalesAmount) AS RevenuTotal
FROM FactInternetSales F
INNER JOIN DimSalesTerritory T ON F.SalesTerritoryKey = T.SalesTerritoryKey
GROUP BY T.SalesTerritoryCountry
ORDER BY RevenuTotal DESC

question: Quelle est la quantité totale de produits vendus ?
sql:
SELECT SUM(F.OrderQuantity) AS QuantiteTotaleProduitsVendus
FROM FactInternetSales F

question: Quels sont les 5 produits les plus vendus en quantité ?
sql:
SELECT TOP 5 P.EnglishProductName AS NomProduit, SUM(F.OrderQuantity) AS QuantiteVendue
FROM FactInternetSales F
INNER JOIN DimProduct P ON F.ProductKey = P.ProductKey
GROUP BY P.EnglishProductName
ORDER BY QuantiteVendue DESC

question: Quels sont les 3 pays générant le plus de chiffre d'affaires ?
sql:
SELECT TOP 3 T.SalesTerritoryCountry AS Pays, SUM(F.SalesAmount) AS CA
FROM FactInternetSales F
INNER JOIN DimSalesTerritory T ON F.SalesTerritoryKey = T.SalesTerritoryKey
GROUP BY T.SalesTerritoryCountry
ORDER BY CA DESC

question: Quel est le produit le plus cher du catalogue ?
Quels sont les 10 clients ayant dépensé le plus ?
sql:
SELECT TOP 10 C.FirstName AS Prenom, C.LastName AS Nom, SUM(F.SalesAmount) AS DepenseTotale
FROM FactInternetSales F
INNER JOIN DimCustomer C ON F.CustomerKey = C.CustomerKey
GROUP BY C.FirstName, C.LastName
ORDER BY DepenseTotale DESC

question: Quelle est la catégorie de produit la plus vendue ?
sql:
SELECT DPC.EnglishProductCategoryName AS Categorie, SUM(F.OrderQuantity) AS NombreVentes
FROM FactInternetSales F
INNER JOIN DimProduct DP ON F.ProductKey = DP.ProductKey
INNER JOIN DimProductSubcategory DPS ON DP.ProductSubcategoryKey = DPS.ProductSubcategoryKey
INNER JOIN DimProductCategory DPC ON DPS.ProductCategoryKey = DPC.ProductCategoryKey
GROUP BY DPC.EnglishProductCategoryName
ORDER BY NombreVentes DESC

question: Quel est le chiffre d'affaires total en 2013 ?
sql:
SELECT SUM(F.SalesAmount) AS CA 
FROM FactInternetSales F 
INNER JOIN DimDate D ON F.OrderDateKey = D.DateKey 
WHERE D.CalendarYear = 2013

question: Quel est le revenu total par année ?
sql:
SELECT D.CalendarYear AS Annee, SUM(F.SalesAmount) AS RevenuTotal
FROM FactInternetSales F
INNER JOIN DimDate D ON F.OrderDateKey = D.DateKey
GROUP BY D.CalendarYear 
ORDER BY D.CalendarYear

question: Quel est le chiffre d'affaires par trimestre en 2013 ?
sql:
SELECT D.CalendarQuarter AS Trimestre, SUM(F.SalesAmount) AS CA
FROM FactInternetSales F
INNER JOIN DimDate D ON F.OrderDateKey = D.DateKey
WHERE D.CalendarYear = 2013
GROUP BY D.CalendarQuarter 
ORDER BY D.CalendarQuarter

question: Combien de commandes ont été passées en 2012 ?
sql:
SELECT COUNT(F.SalesOrderNumber) AS NombreCommandes 
FROM FactInternetSales F 
INNER JOIN DimDate D ON F.OrderDateKey = D.DateKey 
WHERE D.CalendarYear = 2012

question: Quel mois a généré le plus de ventes en 2013 ?
sql:
SELECT TOP 1 D.EnglishMonthName AS Mois, SUM(F.SalesAmount) AS TotalVentes
FROM FactInternetSales F
INNER JOIN DimDate D ON F.OrderDateKey = D.DateKey
WHERE D.CalendarYear = 2013
GROUP BY D.EnglishMonthName, D.MonthNumberOfYear
ORDER BY TotalVentes DESC

question: Quel est le chiffre d'affaires par catégorie de produit et par pays ?
sql:
SELECT 
  PC.EnglishProductCategoryName AS Categorie,
  ST.SalesTerritoryCountry AS Pays,
  SUM(F.SalesAmount) AS CA
FROM 
  FactInternetSales F
  INNER JOIN DimProduct P ON F.ProductKey = P.ProductKey
  INNER JOIN DimProductSubcategory PS ON P.ProductSubcategoryKey = PS.ProductSubcategoryKey
  INNER JOIN DimProductCategory PC ON PS.ProductCategoryKey = PC.ProductCategoryKey
  INNER JOIN DimSalesTerritory ST ON F.SalesTerritoryKey = ST.SalesTerritoryKey
GROUP BY 
  PC.EnglishProductCategoryName, 
  ST.SalesTerritoryCountry
ORDER BY 
  PC.EnglishProductCategoryName, 
  ST.SalesTerritoryCountry

question: Quels sont les clients ayant dépensé plus de 5000 au total ?
sql:
SELECT DC.FirstName AS Prenom, DC.LastName AS Nom, SUM(F.SalesAmount) AS TotalDepense
FROM FactInternetSales F
INNER JOIN DimCustomer DC ON F.CustomerKey = DC.CustomerKey
GROUP BY DC.FirstName, DC.LastName
HAVING SUM(F.SalesAmount) > 5000
ORDER BY TotalDepense DESC

question: Quelle est la marge moyenne par catégorie de produit ?
sql:
SELECT 
  DPC.EnglishProductCategoryName AS CategorieProduit, 
  AVG((F.SalesAmount - F.TotalProductCost) / F.SalesAmount) * 100 AS MargeMoyenne
FROM 
  FactInternetSales F
INNER JOIN 
  DimProduct DP ON F.ProductKey = DP.ProductKey
INNER JOIN 
  DimProductSubcategory DPS ON DP.ProductSubcategoryKey = DPS.ProductSubcategoryKey
INNER JOIN 
  DimProductCategory DPC ON DPS.ProductCategoryKey = DPC.ProductCategoryKey
GROUP BY 
  DPC.EnglishProductCategoryName
ORDER BY 
  DPC.EnglishProductCategoryName

question: Quel est le revenu moyen par commande, par pays ?
sql:
SELECT ST.SalesTerritoryCountry AS Pays, AVG(F.SalesAmount) AS RevenuMoyenParCommande
FROM FactInternetSales F
INNER JOIN DimSalesTerritory ST ON F.SalesTerritoryKey = ST.SalesTerritoryKey
GROUP BY ST.SalesTerritoryCountry
ORDER BY ST.SalesTerritoryCountry

question: Quels produits n'ont jamais été vendus ?
sql:
SELECT P.EnglishProductName AS NomProduit
FROM DimProduct P
LEFT JOIN FactInternetSales F ON P.ProductKey = F.ProductKey
WHERE F.ProductKey IS NULL
